_note: No producer-computed values. Every field is either a structural shape, a named enum constant, or a boundary condition. The objective enum values and required fields are specified by feature-plans/ai-advisor.md AC-2.1..AC-2.5 + Gate-1 Resolution #2.

reduce_correlation.description: Reduce measured pairwise correlation between this symphony and another
reduce_correlation._note: objective must be derived from a measured correlation reading — not a heuristic or a user preference string

reduce_drawdown.description: Reduce maximum drawdown relative to the incumbent asset
reduce_drawdown._note: measured_drawdown_pct is from the backtest stats, never hardcoded

lift_risk_adjusted.description: Lift risk-adjusted return (Sharpe/Sortino) relative to incumbent
lift_risk_adjusted._note: measured_sharpe is from the backtest stats, never hardcoded

operator_initiated_mode._note: Operator specifies the exact swap to try. objective must be a valid SwapObjective enum value, not a free-form string.

advisor_suggested_mode.candidate_generation_must: select candidates that address the stated objective
candidate_generation_must_not: generate candidates by brute-forcing the full ETF universe without objective filtering
generate candidates based on vibes (random or popularity-based selection)
bypass the objective to surface pre-decided candidates
advisor_suggested_mode._note: Per Gate-1 Resolution #2: every swap must be OBJECTIVE-DIRECTED. A naive generator that ignores the objective must produce a test FAIL.

gating_contract.gate_failed_disposition: NOT surfaced as recommendation; may be shown as rejected with reason
gating_contract.zero_survivors_message_required: no swap cleared the gate this run
gating_contract._note: AC-2.3 / AC-2.5. The gate is evaluate_candidate_batch from advisors.backtest_gate_engine — reused, not reimplemented.

invalid_variant_contract.structurally_invalid_tree: must produce per-candidate 'could not backtest this variant' error
invalid_variant_contract._note: AC-2.4: one bad variant tree must not stop other candidates from being backtested and gated.

persistence_contract._note: AC-X3. Every surfaced swap is persisted as an advisor_observation. is_advisory_only=1 is structural, not optional.

advise_only_guard._note: AC-X1: the asset swap engine must be statically verifiable as using ONLY read + inline-backtest endpoints.

live_path_guard._note: AC-X2: no advisor module may appear on the 1-minute live execution path. Verified by static import-graph test.

no_api_key_contract._note: AC-X4: when Composer API key is absent, the engine must return a clear message and persist nothing.
